content: TS Decorator pitfalls: experimentalDecorators uses (target, key, descriptor) signature + reflect-metadata polyfill. TC39 Stage 3 decorators (TS 5.0+, no flag needed) use (value, context) signature and do NOT support emitDecoratorMetadata — type runtime metadata is lost. You CANNOT mix both APIs in one project. Typegoose confirmed: TS 5.0 ES Decorators are incompatible with Typegoose because metadata is unavailable. Array element types are never emitted by reflect-metadata (returns only 'Array'). esbuild/tsx/Vite do not support emitDecoratorMetadata without plugins. Parameter decorators are absent from TC39 standard. For ODMs relying on runtime type metadata (design:type), you must stay on experimentalDecorators for now.
